description_long: This object is an open book with two visible spreads, one of which appears to have a green string or ribbon bookmark attached. The covers are a muted olive or khaki color, and the pages are a lighter, off-white shade. The book is illustrated with simple line drawings, and one spread features a rectangular cutout, possibly for a photograph or note. The book's construction suggests a hardcover with slightly rounded edges and a sturdy binding. There is a faint, handwritten-style inscription on one of the pages, adding a personal touch. The overall appearance is that of a scrapbook or photo album, rather than a standard text-heavy book.
description: An open, olive-colored hardcover book with light pages, a green ribbon, and simple line illustrations, resembling a scrapbook or photo album.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showing the thinness of the covers and the slight separation between the two open spreads.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the green ribbon bookmark and the rectangular cutout on one of the pages.
description_view_2: A top-down view reveals both open spreads, the line illustrations, and the handwritten-style inscription on the right page.
description_view_3: From this angle, the book's binding and the depth of the covers are visible, as well as the cutout and ribbon detail.
